chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. S – 249 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 02.02.2026 Petitioner Salim Marwani present in person Mr. Shahryar Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Inspector Mushtaque Jatoi, SHO PS A-Section, Ghotki and Muhammad Akram, PDSP on behalf of SSP, Ghotki >>>>>..<<<<< Statements have been filed by SSP, Ghotki as well as SHO Police Station A-Section, Ghotki, are taken on record. Perusal of the statements reveal that two of the accused persons have already been granted bail while third accused has been declared as absconder and proceedings u/s 87/88 Cr.PC have been initiated against him by the Court of Civil Judge and Judicial Magistrate-II/MTMC, Ghotki. The instant Constitutional petition is disposed of with direction to the learned trial Court to expedite the matter and conclude the same within 60 days from today in accordance with the law. Judge ARBROHI
